name: Title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972
description: Prohibits sex discrimination in federally funded education programs
enforcement_agency: U.S. Department of Education, Office for Civil Rights
penalty_authority: Loss of federal funding, civil penalties

requirements.title: Title IX Coordinator
requirements.description: Institution must designate a Title IX Coordinator and publish contact information

requirements.title: Grievance Procedures
requirements.description: Institution must adopt and publish grievance procedures for sex discrimination complaints

requirements.title: Response to Sexual Harassment
requirements.description: Institution must respond promptly and effectively to sexual harassment reports

requirements.title: Investigation and Adjudication
requirements.description: Institution must follow specified procedures for investigating and adjudicating complaints

requirements.title: Non-Discrimination Notice
requirements.description: Institution must publish a notice of non-discrimination policy
